# Pointers Consulting

> Melbourne-based specialist in SMSF (Self-Managed Super Fund) advisory, tax planning, and business accounting for Australian businesses, professionals, and investors.

## About

Pointers Consulting is led by Sharat Sharma (Sam), a CPA-qualified accountant and Registered Tax Agent (#26122730) with over 20 years of experience across Australia, Asia, and the Middle East. The firm specialises in SMSF strategy, tax planning, and business advisory for Australian SMEs and investors.

**Credentials:**
- CPA Australia
- Registered Tax Agent #26122730 (Tax Practitioners Board)
- SMSF Association Member
- ASIC Registered Agent

**Location:** Level 17, Tower 4, 727 Collins Street, Docklands VIC 3008, Australia
**Phone:** +61 426 784 982
**Email:** sam@pointersconsulting.com.au
**Hours:** Monday to Friday, 9:00am – 5:00pm AEST

## Services

- [SMSF Advisory](https://pointersconsulting.com.au/services/smsf) — Setup, compliance, audit, and strategy for individual trustees and accountants
- [For Accountants (B2B)](https://pointersconsulting.com.au/services/smsf/for-accountants) — White-label SMSF administration and compliance support
- [For Individuals (B2C)](https://pointersconsulting.com.au/services/smsf/for-individuals) — Personalised SMSF guidance from assessment through ongoing compliance
- [SMSF FitForMe Checkup](https://pointersconsulting.com.au/services/smsf/fitforme) — Free 25-question SMSF readiness assessment tool
- [Business Advisory & Taxation](https://pointersconsulting.com.au/services) — Tax planning, structuring, and business strategy
- [Audit & Risk Assurance](https://pointersconsulting.com.au/services) — Independent audit services for SMSFs and businesses

## Contact

[Book a free consultation](https://pointersconsulting.com.au/contact) — free initial 15-minute consultation, no obligation.
